channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: 最近真的太缺乏睡眠，等今明两天的分享结束，NHK 节目的拍摄就正式告一段落，节目五月中下旬在电视台播出，感兴趣的朋友可以到时打开电视看看。然后我得专门找个时间去乡下住一阵子，天天泡温泉才能恢复正常节律...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:

item.description:

item.title:
🔥 Absolute war is breaking out finally on the server
Added red tracers so you can see who's shootin...
item.description:
🔥 Absolute war is breaking out finally on the server
Added red tracers so you can see who's shooting who
Also I got the domain https://t.co/ErAl5CK9MB now
I want to improve the bullet sounds a bit to make them sound more localized, like far away should sound more high passed I think
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 4 | 👁 1618
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: 我很好奇是不是有一些 vibe 项目为了 star 买了推广？我在信息流上有时会看到很多无关的账户用 AI 翻译腔发同一个项目配上类似的介绍，刷用户我还能理解，刷 star 到底是为了啥？
item.author: @turingou
